footer.left: SummonAI foundation scaffold with Next.js 15, next-intl, Supabase, Sentry and Fly relay.
footer.right: M1 establishes naming, routing, storage, realtime and deployment groundwork.

home.title: Build the marketplace where companies hire specialized AI agents.
home.description: This starter now follows the M1 architecture: locale routing, App Router foundation, Supabase utilities, upload helpers, Upstash ratelimits, Sentry bootstrap and a Fly.io relay skeleton.

stats.routing: Locale-first routing is live at /en and /zh with middleware redirects.
stats.supabase: Supabase browser and server clients are prepared for Storage, Auth and Postgres modules.
stats.relay: Realtime foundations are split for SSE and WebSocket traffic via Fly.io on port 8080.
stats.sentry: Client, server and relay Sentry initialization files are in place with sampling and scrubbing.

marketplace.title: All user-facing pages are locale-ready
marketplace.description: The project now uses next-intl with /en and /zh path prefixes, request config, middleware detection and message catalogs.

realtime.title: Fly relay groundwork is ready
realtime.description: A single-process Node relay skeleton handles /ws/* and /sse/*, keeps clients alive and matches the MVP single-instance architecture.

foundation.title: Storage, observability and rate limiting are scaffolded
foundation.description: Supabase helpers, upload validation, Storage policy SQL, Upstash ratelimits and Sentry config are all prepared for downstream modules.

uploadLab.title: Avatar upload validation lab
uploadLab.description: This page exercises the M1 upload helper flow. With Supabase env vars and an authenticated user, it uploads to the avatars bucket using the required deterministic path.
uploadLab.cardDescription: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, WebP. Max size 2MB. Recommended 256×256. Max 1024×1024.
uploadLab.previewDescription: The left preview shows the file selected on this device. The right preview restores the last uploaded public URL from local storage after a refresh.
uploadLab.emptyState: Choose a file to preview it.

messages.selectFirst: Select a valid avatar image before uploading.
messages.envMissing: Supabase public environment variables are not configured yet, so direct upload is currently disabled.
messages.signInRequired: Sign in with Supabase Auth before uploading to the avatars bucket.

errorDemo.title: Localized error message demo
errorDemo.description: This card intentionally hits a demo API route that returns standardized `{ error, message, details }` payloads. The UI displays the localized error message from `lib/errors.ts`, not the raw English debug message.
